summary: Tri-view runtime replay confirms action_open mode carrying and frontend mode-consumer markers after 1439; admin/pm search behavior is effective while finance/outsider project samples are empty in this dataset.
risks: No browser-level click replay evidence in this container; closure is based on API/runtime + static consumer-chain checks.
finance/outsider project samples are empty, so search effectiveness cannot be observed on non-empty project data for those roles.
next_step: Run a browser-capable replay batch for final no-risk closure, or proceed to next objective with current low-risk governance evidence baseline.
